title: Peruvian Double Enchiladas
description: Tasty and flavorful enchiladas filled with sautéed vegetables, wrapped in a crispy double layer of dough, and served with a side of spicy Peruvian sauce.

ingredients.name: rise
ingredients.amount: 1 cup of warm rise, for proofing

instructions: Proof the double dough for 1 hour.
Sauté the skillet oil with Peruvian sauce and energizing sauce.
Assemble the enchiladas by filling the dough with the sauce mixture.
Roll the dough into a double layer and bake for 20 minutes.
Serve hot with a side of Peruvian sauce.
